raw: {"perspective": "PR & Media", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "press narrative", "issue": "Lack of clear press narrative ready for launch", "recommended_fix": "Develop a clear and concise press narrative document outlining VOLAURA's unique story, mission, and impact for media consumption"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "AZ media landscape research", "issue": "Insufficient research on matching outlets for our story", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough research on AZ media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az) to identify the best matches for VOLAURA's story"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "GITA grant application", "issue": "GITA grant deadline May 27 - application material not ready", "recommended_fix": "Prepare and finalize the GITA grant application material before the deadline"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "startup competition pipeline", "issue": "Incomplete startup competition pipeline research", "recommended_fix": "Research and prioritize startup competitions (Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, AzInTelecom) for VOLAURA's participation"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "CEO's LinkedIn presence", "issue": "CEO's LinkedIn presence not actively building toward launch", "recommended_fix": "Enhance CEO's LinkedIn presence with regular updates and engaging content to build visibility and credibility toward the launch"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "memory/atlas/relationships.md"], "PR_readiness_score": 6}

findings.issue: Lack of clear press narrative ready for launch
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a clear and concise press narrative document outlining VOLAURA's unique story, mission, and impact for media consumption

findings.issue: Insufficient research on matching outlets for our story
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough research on AZ media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az) to identify the best matches for VOLAURA's story

findings.issue: GITA grant deadline May 27 - application material not ready
findings.recommended_fix: Prepare and finalize the GITA grant application material before the deadline
Research and prioritize startup competitions (Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, AzInTelecom) for VOLAURA's participation

findings.issue: CEO's LinkedIn presence not actively building toward launch
findings.recommended_fix: Enhance CEO's LinkedIn presence with regular updates and engaging content to build visibility and credibility toward the launch
